familyEntryPoints.note: Use this family README to enter the adapters workspace tree before dropping into package-specific READMEs.
Use this family README for the hooks-adapter package set and adapter lineup.
The docs-site plugin landing page is the canonical discovery entrypoint for harness plugin packages and plugin-system concepts.
